summary: First test pass for Palestra IT (Italian gym app). Backend: 9/9 pytest tests passed for /api/, /api/exercises (list+filters+search), /api/exercises/groups, /api/exercises/{id} detail and 404. Frontend: Full end-to-end mobile workflow verified - Schede home + FAB -> new workout draft -> name input -> exercise picker (search 'panca' works) -> pick panca-piana-bilanciere -> confirm -> back in edit with reorder/delete -> Inizia Allenamento -> active session -> reps/weight inputs -> set check triggers rest timer panel -> countdown decreases (01:29->01:26) -> +15s works (01:26->01:41) -> Salta hides panel -> Termina+Conferma saves to Storico and navigates correctly. Storico shows entry with Volume/Serie/Durata and expand shows exercise breakdown (8x60kg). Progressi shows all 4 stat cards (Allenamenti=1, Volume Totale=480 kg, Serie=1, Minuti=0) + Volume Settimanale weekly bar chart + 1RM Stimato + Top Esercizi. Esercizi tab shows 47 esercizi disponibili, search + muscle chips work, exercise detail modal opens with instructions list and tags. CRITICAL BUG: all 47 exercise images return 404 due to wrong URL path in backend/exercises_data.py img() helper (extra /images/ path segment). Minor: muscle chips in picker were missing testID per spec; I added testID={`muscle-chip-${g.id}`} in /app/frontend/app/picker/exercises.tsx. No deprecated Expo packages detected (no expo-av/barcode-scanner/background-fetch).

ui_bugs.issue: All 47 exercise images return HTTP 404. The img() helper produces URLs like .../exercises/{slug}/images/{idx}.jpg but the real free-exercise-db path is .../exercises/{slug}/{idx}.jpg. Hero image and example thumbnails on exercise detail screen render empty, and FlatList thumbnails in Esercizi library / picker show grey placeholders. Reference: /app/backend/exercises_data.py:11

issues: Hero image area at top is empty/blank because image URL is broken (see ui_bugs above)
'Esempi' example thumbnail boxes appear empty grey for the same reason

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents.' Likely from a third-party RN view; non-blocking but worth tracking. Reference: appears on every screen load.

action_items: Fix /app/backend/exercises_data.py:11 - change img() helper from f"{IMG_BASE}/{slug}/images/{idx}.jpg" to f"{IMG_BASE}/{slug}/{idx}.jpg" so all 47 exercise images load (verified: correct path returns HTTP 200, broken path returns 404).
After fixing the URL, also confirm fields used as GIF (e.g. e.get('gif')/e.get('image')) all render correctly in the exercise detail screen and library list.
critical_code_review_comments: exercises_data.py: 47 hand-curated exercises sharing one img() helper - one-line bug breaks the entire image experience.
Picker muscle chips were missing testID attributes prescribed by the spec ('muscle-chip-Petto', etc.); I added them in /app/frontend/app/picker/exercises.tsx.
Backend list_exercises returns light payload (omits instructions) which is good for performance.
No MongoDB usage in current backend; app is fully local AsyncStorage on the frontend as described.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Tests rely on the static EXERCISES list in /app/backend/exercises_data.py (47 entries). Frontend session-local data created during runs is cleared each browser session (AsyncStorage is per-session in web preview).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_exercises_api.py can be reused as regression. To E2E test in one browser session because AsyncStorage resets between sessions, perform: create workout -> add exercise via picker -> start -> mark set -> end+confirm, then navigate to /progress and /history within the same playwright run to assert stats and breakdown. After main agent fixes img() URL, retest exercise detail modal hero image and library thumbnails by checking src returns HTTP 200 via page.evaluate fetch HEAD.
rca_of_issue: RCA - Broken exercise images: In /app/backend/exercises_data.py line 11, img(slug, idx) returns f"{IMG_BASE}/{slug}/images/{idx}.jpg". The yuhonas/free-exercise-db repo stores files directly under exercises/{slug}/{idx}.jpg with no nested 'images' folder. curl HEAD verifies: .../Barbell_Bench_Press_-_Medium_Grip/images/0.jpg -> 404; .../Barbell_Bench_Press_-_Medium_Grip/0.jpg -> 200. Mitigation: remove the '/images' segment in the img() helper. This single change fixes all 47 exercises' hero+thumbnail images that flow through the backend response and into the Expo Image component.
